settings.wardrobe_prompt: tailored dark blazer over textured shirt, clothed shoulders

findings: Wardrobe consistency improved: visible blazer and collared/textured shirt, clothed shoulders, no bare-shoulder/strapless output
Face realism passes: coherent proportions, natural skin texture, stable lips/nose/cheeks
Eyes pass: clean irises/catchlights, no colored control artifact, no over-dark stain
Hair passes with plausible volume and edge softness
Lighting and background are coherent, subdued editorial style
No hands, feet, or teeth visible; these categories remain unassessed, not passed
Control adherence is moderate and stable; no obvious control-map stain or face paint artifact

promotion_decision.reason: The wardrobe prompt fixed the prior bare-shoulder/clothing inconsistency without regressing face/eye quality or reintroducing control artifacts.

remaining_risks: Local proof does not replace EC2 target-runtime generation/pullback/QA
Portrait crop still does not exercise hands, feet, or teeth
A broader multi-pose QA set is needed before final portfolio certification
